scenes.narration: Bhai, Google ke SDE-2 round mein Process vs Thread vs Goroutine pe ye trick poochhi jati hai. 30 second sun le.
Without understanding Process vs Thread vs Goroutine, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Process vs Thread vs Goroutine like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Process vs Thread vs Goroutine: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Process vs Thread vs Goroutine: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Process vs Thread vs Goroutine to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Process vs Thread vs Goroutine solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
